keybind_open_menu.name: Open Menu
keybind_open_menu.description: Opens or closes the xdBot menu.

keybind_toggle_stepper.name: Toggle Frame Stepper
keybind_toggle_stepper.description: Turns the frame stepper on or off.

keybind_step_forward.name: Step Forward
keybind_step_forward.description: Steps one frame forward when the frame stepper is enabled.

frame_offset.name: Frame Offset
frame_offset.description: Adds a frame offset when recording or playing macros

endscreen_button.name: Button at Endscreen
endscreen_button.description: Shows the menu button at the endscreen.

ffmpeg_path.name: ffmpeg.exe Path
ffmpeg_path.description: The path for ffmpeg.exe, needed to use render.

editor_keybinds.name: Keybinds on editor
editor_keybinds.description: Enables keybinds while on the level editor.

recording_only_keybinds.name: Keybinds only while recording
recording_only_keybinds.description: Keybinds only work while recording a macro.

level_settings_button.name: Show Button At Settings
level_settings_button.description: Shows the xdBot button in the level settings layer.

restore_page.name: Restore Settings Page
restore_page.description: Saves the page you were in when you closed the menu.

disable_speedhack.name: Auto Disable Speedhack
disable_speedhack.description: Disables Speedhack when exiting a level.

frame_fixes_limit.name: Frame Fixes Limit in FPS
frame_fixes_limit.description: Limits how many frame fixes per second there will be.

auto_stop_playing.name: Auto Stop Playing
auto_stop_playing.description: Stops playing the macro when it ends.

nakomod_pbo.name: NakoMod: Fast PBO Frame Capture
nakomod_pbo.description: Asynchronously reads frames from the GPU to prevent game freezes during rendering. Speeds up rendering significantly.

nakomod_multithreading.name: NakoMod: Multithreaded Render Queue
nakomod_multithreading.description: Sends captured frames to a background thread queue instead of blocking the game process.

nakomod_hw_accel.name: NakoMod: Hardware Acceleration
nakomod_hw_accel.description: Selects the video codec. CPU is the slowest, NVIDIA/AMD uses your GPU video chip.

nakomod_aggressive_presets.name: NakoMod: Aggressive Presets (CPU)
nakomod_aggressive_presets.description: Sets FFmpeg to 'ultrafast'. Massive speed boost for CPU rendering at the cost of larger file size.

nakomod_vflip_manual.name: NakoMod: Fast C++ VFlip
nakomod_vflip_manual.description: Flips the image in code instead of using FFmpeg's video filter. Saves filtering time.

macro_step_shift_enabled.name: Custom Step Size
macro_step_shift_enabled.description: Enables holding Shift to step a custom amount of frames.

macro_step_shift_size.name: Step Size Amount
macro_step_shift_size.description: Amount of frames to step when holding shift.

macro_hold_step_size.name: Hold Step Amount
macro_hold_step_size.description: How many frames to step forward per tick while holding the frame stepper key.
